ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Continued To Feb-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Hobson appeared by zoom for Therese Rodgers (administration).

Mr. Hobson apologized to the court for not appearing at the last hearing and stated that it was his mistake. Sanctions in the amount of $250.00 are ordered against Mr. Hobson and are to be paid within 10 days. Discussion was held regarding the inventory and appraisal not having been filed yet, the need to establish a special needs trust for one of the sisters and the issue of the tax liability. Status on close of estate is continued to February 10, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Hobson is to put together a petition for a special needs trust, check in with his client regarding the tax issue and tie up any lose ends in the estate. If the estate is not ready to be closed by then, Mr. Hobson is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration under Probate Code 12200.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-03-2024 Continued To Jul-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that this hearing date was set pursuant to the order appointing the administrator that was filed on May 9, 2023. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Therese Rutherford Rodgers and the Attorney Micheal B. Hobson to appear on July 1, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for counsel to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to July 1, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Continued To May-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Hobson, via Zoom, for Therese Rodgers, Petitioner.

Upon query by the court, counsel reports on the issues he's encountered with filing documents via the court's e-filing system and subsequent rejection of documents that he's attempted to electronically file. Counsel requests a continuance to resolve the issues.

The matter is continued to May-08-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
